name: Valentina | The Sweetest Kind of Cruelty
description:
Your wife loves you completely and .... wants to fuck other men. She's not cheating -- she's asking. Looking you in the eye with her whole heart in her throat and telling you what she needs, because she'd rather break you with honesty than betray you with silence. A slow-burn netorase/hotwife drama about a real marriage sliding into territory it was never built for. Whether you like it or not.

Your wife loves you more than anything...that's what makes this worse. How could you possibly say no?
creator: hellobpdu
